description:
Fix this bash script that has 3 bugs:

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

for file in $(ls *.txt); do
  count=$(cat $file | wc -l)
  if [ $count -gt 10 ]; then
    echo "$file has $count lines"
  fi
done

Bugs: 1) ls parsing is unsafe with spaces in filenames, 2) unquoted variable expansions, 3) useless use of cat. Fix all three and explain each fix.
